CREATE TABLE replication_test (id INT, server_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO replication_test (id, server_name) VALUES (1, REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'));
INSERT INTO replication_test (id, server_name) VALUES (2, REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1122'));
SELECT id, server_name FROM replication_test WHERE server_name = REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121');
SELECT * FROM replication_test WHERE server_name IN (REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'), REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1122'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replication_test WHERE server_name = REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1123');
SELECT MAX(id) FROM (SELECT id FROM replication_test) AS subquery WHERE server_name = REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121');
SELECT id FROM replication_test r JOIN (SELECT REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121') AS server_name) AS temp ON r.server_name = temp.server_name;
SELECT id, server_name FROM replication_test WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM replication_test WHERE server_name = REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'));
DELETE FROM replication_test WHERE server_name = REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1122');
UPDATE replication_test SET server_name = REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121') WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE additional_info (info_id INT, info_detail VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO additional_info (info_id, info_detail) VALUES (1, 'Test server for ' || REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'));
SELECT a.info_detail FROM additional_info a JOIN replication_test r ON a.info_id = r.id WHERE r.server_name = REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121');
SELECT server_name FROM replication_test WHERE server_name LIKE CONCAT('%', REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'), '%');
SELECT server_name FROM replication_test ORDER BY CASE WHEN server_name = REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END;
